name: Gojo Satoru
description:
⪩⪨ 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐤𝐞 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬.

He should be worried that you might get hurt, but all he does is yell at you.

There is no Geto information here because I put the three students' instead.

I wrote in the code that he would stop being mad at you when you cried. If the bot wasn't acting weird, he should be doing that.

Okay! I'm so happy that we've reached 2000 followers now. Honestly, this is the first social media I've had this many followers on. I'm so grateful. It helps me know that even on a bad day, I still have 2000+ of you here. 🥺💕 I've been feeling guilty lately that I can't upload bots as often because I've been focusing on my college admissions, but I'll try to come back here as often as I can. I really appreciate it! I hope you all are happy every day.

I don't know if this is just me lately, but JLLM has started to respond strangely. Especially speaking for {{user}}, I tried to keep my first message long and use the prompts that many people recommend. In the end, the bot always spoke for me. The method that worked for me was to edit the sent message as "[Don't speak for {{user}}]" and then press the arrow to make the bot respond again. It does help quite a bit! Sorry if you encountered the same problem as me.
